overall.description: Game engine footage from Microsoft Flight Simulator showcasing the Montreal Olympic Stadium. The camera smoothly orbits around the distinctive inclined tower and main stadium structure on a clear summer day, moving along paved plazas and past landscaped trees with no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching Olympic stadium complex

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding forward along the paved plaza toward the stadium structure

entered.detail: large circular concrete stadium with glass facade sections
distinctive leaning concrete tower with cable supports
modern rectangular multi-story building with grid windows
well-maintained green grass area bordering the plaza
wide concrete tile surface forming the main walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of the Montreal Olympic Stadium's main structure and distinctive inclined tower on the left, with a modern white office building standing on the right. The camera moves smoothly along a paved plaza bordered by grass lawns under a clear blue sky, approaching the stadium complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined walkway at stadium base with reflecting pool

events.description: dense tree foliage temporarily obscures the view of the inclined tower
camera passes the blue reflecting pool at the stadium base

agents.ego_description: navigating through scattered trees at the stadium perimeter, passing the water feature

entered.detail: deciduous trees with green foliage lining the walkway
narrow blue water channel running alongside the stadium base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a landscaped area with moderate tree coverage, temporarily obscuring the tower. A blue reflecting pool becomes visible at the base of the stadium as the white office building disappears from view behind, while the camera continues along the paved path.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza at the base of the inclined tower

events.description: camera begins circling right around the tower base

agents.ego_description: circling the massive inclined tower base, examining the structural concrete details

segments.scene_description: Clear of the trees, the camera circles the base of the iconic inclined tower, which dominates the frame and appears much larger. The main stadium structure recedes to the left background while the camera smoothly orbits the tower's foundation, showcasing its massive scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: under the inclined tower arch looking upward

events.description: camera tilts upward to emphasize the height of the inclined tower against the sky

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the tower while looking up at its full height and architectural details

entered.detail: grassy area visible beyond the tower base

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses tightly on the inclined tower as the camera moves around its base, tilting upward to capture the structure's impressive height and unique architectural lines against the bright sky. The main stadium structure is now behind the camera as the view opens to show grassy areas beyond the tower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a wide architectural overview of the Montreal Olympic Stadium and gradually tightens into an intimate, towering perspective of its iconic inclined tower. It begins by gliding across a paved plaza under a clear blue sky, with the stadium and a modern white office building framing the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the view shifts through a landscaped area of trees that temporarily obscure the tower before revealing a blue reflecting pool at the stadium's base. The scene then opens up as the camera circles the foundation of the inclined tower, causing the main stadium structure to recede into the background while the tower begins to dominate the frame. Finally, the camera orbits the base of the tower and tilts upward, capturing its massive scale and unique architectural lines against the bright sky as the surrounding grassy areas open up behind.
